--- revoke_on_all_sequences_in_schema.sql
REVOKE SELECT, UPDATE ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA sch1 FROM ROLE data_analyst
--- AST
&ast.Revoke{
  Privilege: &ast.PrivilegeOnAllSequencesInSchema{
    Privileges: []ast.TablePrivilege{
      &ast.SelectPrivilege{
        Select: 7,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
      &ast.UpdatePrivilege{
        Update: 15,
        Rparen: -1,
      },
    },
    Schemas: []*ast.Path{
      &ast.Path{
        Idents: []*ast.Ident{
          &ast.Ident{
            NamePos: 49,
            NameEnd: 53,
            Name:    "sch1",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Roles: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 64,
      NameEnd: 76,
      Name:    "data_analyst",
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
REVOKE SELECT, UPDATE ON ALL SEQUENCES IN SCHEMA sch1 FROM ROLE data_analyst
